rules.name: company_generic_suffix
rules.description: REMOVED: This rule was too broad, causing false positives on partial names like 'Steuerberatungs GmbH', 'Co KG', and 'Partner GmbH'. It has been deleted to improve precision.

rules.name: company_generic_suffix_strict
rules.description: Matches organization names with generic suffixes (GmbH, AG, KG, etc.) only if preceded by a multi-word proper noun (at least two capitalized words) to avoid false positives on fragments like 'Steuerberatung GmbH'.
